title: Plugin Run Audit Schema
steps: Add plugin_runs table linked to analysis_runs or otherwise anchored to project audit state.
Store plugin_id, plugin_version, manifest_digest, input_digest, config_digest, status, permissions_json, diagnostics_json, started_at, finished_at.
Add repository methods to create/update/list plugin run audit records.
Keep analysis_runs artifact-wide status semantics unchanged so TUI latest_analysis_run is not polluted by plugin lifecycle states.
convergence_criteria: Migrations remain idempotent on new and existing project DBs.
Plugin run audit records round-trip through repository tests.
No existing analysis run tests regress.

result.summary: Plugin run audit schema and repository round-trip implemented without changing analysis run semantics.
result.tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-db plugin_runs_round_trip_audit_record passed; cargo test --workspace passed
